entries.source: "Opportunity cost"
entries.value: "Coût d’opportunité"

entries.source: "Should a company enter this market?"
entries.value: "Une entreprise devrait-elle entrer sur ce marché ?"

entries.source: "What makes an argument valid?"
entries.value: "Qu’est-ce qui rend un argument valide ?"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Socratic Instruction on inspir for foundations learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Un guide pratique pour utiliser Socratic Instruction sur inspir pour l’apprentissage fondamental, avec des prompts, des boucles d’étude et des habitudes IA plus sûres.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Une boucle d’étude plus solide

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Tuteur IA

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Version française : Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Demandez à l’IA de vérifier votre raisonnement, pas seulement le résultat.

entries.source: Build a hypothesis.
entries.value: Construire une hypothèse.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Terminez en réécrivant l'idée de mémoire.

entries.source: Foundations
entries.value: Fondamentaux

entries.source: Learners who want to think through a topic, test assumptions, and build durable understanding.
entries.value: Apprenants souhaitant approfondir un sujet, tester des hypothèses et construire une compréhension durable.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prompts à essayer

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Socratic IA Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use IA for learning instead of passive réponse collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each réponse, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding: practical guide
entries.value: Tuteur IA socratique pour une compréhension plus profonde : guide pratique

entries.source: Socratic Instruction
entries.value: Instruction socratique

entries.source: Start the live mode at Socratic Instruction. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Collaborative Instruction. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Démarrez le mode en direct Instruction socratique. Si vous voulez un format d’apprentissage voisin, essayez Instruction collaborative. Pour une vue plus large de la plateforme, lisez ce qu’un compagnon d’apprentissage IA devrait faire pour tout le monde.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Dites au mode ce que vous essayez d’apprendre ou de produire.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get retour, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: That focus matters. A general chatbot can réponse almost anything, but a mode d’apprentissage gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, pratique, retour, or exploration that helps the idea stick.

entries.source: The tutor asks one question at a time, waits for your reasoning, and synthesizes only after you have tried.
entries.value: Le tuteur pose une question à la fois, attend votre raisonnement et ne synthétise qu'après que vous ayez essayé.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: C’est la même habitude qui sous-tend le fait d’étudier avec l’IA sans se tromper soi-même : garder l’apprenant actif. L’IA est surtout utile lorsqu’elle vous donne un retour sur votre pensée.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Ce mode est particulièrement utile pour les apprenants qui veulent :

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Essayez d’expliquer l’étape avec vos propres mots.

entries.source: Turn confusion into a clearer model.
entries.value: Transformez confusion en a clearer model.

entries.source: Use hints before answers.
entries.value: Utilisez indices before answers.

entries.source: Use Socratic Instruction when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Utilisez Socratic Instruction lorsque vous voulez une séance qui démarre vite tout en s’adaptant à vous. Le premier objectif n’est pas d’avoir l’air impressionnant. Il est de rendre la prochaine étape possible.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Que this mode helps with

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Où aller ensuite

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Vous pouvez aussi commencer avec une version approximative de votre vrai problème. Un premier prompt brouillon convient très bien. La session peut clarifier le niveau, le public, l'échéance et le style une fois que vous avez commencé.
